octopus-salad-from-paros-argiro.name: Octopus Salad From Paros

ingredients.item: 1 cup of apple vinegar unfiltered, top
1 cup of apple vinegar unfiltered, top

instructions: We start by cleaning the octopus first, wash it and drain it.
Place it in a pot with the gum (cup) upwards.
Pour with olive oil, apple vinegar unfiltered TOP and wine.
Add the bay leaf and pepper and let them boil on medium heat for 40 minutes or until softened (depending on how well the octopus is beaten).
When it softens, we put it on a platter and so warm sprinkle it with oregano.
Once cold, cut it into bites with a knife.
Put it in a glass vessel and pour it with the juices in which it boiled.
Mix carefully to clothe each piece of it with its juices and keep it covered in the refrigerator.
When served, pour with raw olive oil and a few drops of vinegar.

okasans-japanese-steamed-salmon.name: Okasan's Japanese Steamed Salmon
instructions: Quarter or halve salmon side; set aside.
Combine chicken broth, ginger, soy sauce, minced onion, mirin, and sesame oil in a large, heavy pot over medium-high heat; bring to a boil, then reduce heat to a simmer.

Place a steamer insert into the pot; arrange salmon in a single layer in the insert. Cover pot; steam, 5 to 7 minutes, checking for desired doneness. Transfer salmon to a platter; keep warm. Remove insert.
Boil broth mixture until reduced into a sauce consistency, 2 to 4 minutes; spoon over salmon.

old-fashioned-coconut-cream-pie.name: Old-fashioned Coconut Cream Pie
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spread coconut on a baking sheet.
Bake coconut in the preheated oven, stirring occasionally, until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Combine half-and-half, sugar, flour, eggs, and salt in a medium pot. Bring to a boil over low heat, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens and coats the back of a wooden spoon, about 15 minutes.
Remove the pan from heat and stir in 3/4 cup toasted coconut and vanilla; reserve remaining toasted coconut for garnishing the pie.
Pour custard into pie shell and chill until firm, about 4 hours.
Top with whipped topping and reserved toasted coconut.
Enjoy!

olive-oil-ice-cream.name: Olive Oil Ice Cream
instructions: Bring milk, cream, salt, and ½ cup sugar just to a simmer in a medium saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar; remove from heat.
Whisk egg yolks and 2 Tbsp. sugar in a medium bowl until pale, about 2 minutes.
Gradually whisk ½ cup hot milk mixture into yolks to temper them.
Whisk the tempered yolk mixture into the remaining milk mixture in the saucepan.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thick enough to coat the back of a wooden spoon, 2–3 minutes.
Strain custard through a fine-mesh sieve into a medium bowl set in a large bowl of ice water; whisk in oil.
Let cool completely, stirring occasionally, until thoroughly chilled.
Process the chilled custard in an ice cream maker according to manufacturer’s instructions.
Transfer ice cream to an airtight container, cover, and freeze until firm, at least 4 hours.
DO AHEAD: Ice cream can be made 1 week ahead. Keep frozen in an airtight container.

olive-oilroasted-spring-onions.name: Olive Oil–roasted Spring Onions
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Arrange onions in a large baking dish (trim tops to fit if needed); season with salt and pepper. Pour oil over and toss onions to coat. Roast until bulbs are tender and tops are golden brown and crisp, 25–30 minutes. Let cool slightly before serving. Reserve onion-infused oil for another use.

one-skillet-chicken-thighs-with-pesto-an.name: One-skillet Chicken Thighs With Pesto And Vegetables
instructions: Combine red onion, oil, soy sauce, basil, vinegar, garlic, and peppercorns for marinade in a zip-top bag and mix well. Add chicken and massage well. Let sit for 4 to 6 hours in the refrigerator, flipping once halfway through.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Remove chicken from the refrigerator and discard marinade.

Melt 3 tablespoons butter in a large cast iron skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken, skin-side down, and sear until golden brown, 4 to 5 minutes. (This will melt out most of the fat underneath and will leave a nice crispy skin.) Flip chicken and cook for 1 minute more. Remove chicken to a plate and set aside.

Drain the extra fat and oil from the skillet, then melt remaining 1 tablespoon of butter. When butter has melted, add red onion and garlic to the pan and cook, stirring frequently, 1 to 2 minutes. Mix in green beans, potatoes, cherry tomatoes, bell pepper, salt, and pepper. Cook for 4 to 5 minutes, stirring throughout. Return chicken to the skillet.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven, and bake for 15 minutes.

Remove the skillet from the oven. Top chicken thighs with basil leaves, then halloumi cheese slices, making sure cheese does not touch the sides of the pan. Return to the oven and cook until chicken is no longer pink in the centers, 15 to 20 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C).
Turn on the broiler and broil until the cheese is golden brown, 3 to 5 minutes more, checking frequently to prevent burning.

Meanwhile, prepare pesto sauce: Combine olive oil, pine nuts, garlic, lemon juice, salt, pepper, and hot sauce in a blender and blitz for 30 seconds. Add basil and blitz until it's the consistency of pesto, about 30 seconds.
Drizzle the pesto sauce primary onto the chicken, but also on the veggies.

onion-and-cheese-cream-comedera.name: Onion And Cheese Cream
onion-and-cheese-cream-comedera.original_name: Perfecta crema de cebolla y queso
instructions: Inicia la receta y toma las cebollas. Corta en tiras o cubos medianos.
Posteriormente, toma el puerro, limpia y lava muy bien. Solo toma la parte blanca (tallo) y filetea. Haz lo propio con los dientes de ajo.
Calienta una olla o cazuela y agrega la mantequilla.
Una vez derretida, incorpora la cebolla y los dientes de ajo. Mezcla y cocina por 2 minutos.
He later adds his leek. Mixing and cooking for another 2 minutes without letting much golden.
After that time, pour the stock of vegetables, salt and pepper to taste. Mix and cook for another 7 minutes till the vegetables are soft.
Turn off, let's get some cold and then process till the plants are well united.
After they are professed, put the mixture back into the pot and incorporates milk cream and mozzarella cheese.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Meg and cook till everything gets integrated and cook very well while keeping moving. That'll take about ten minutes.
Una vez lista, prueba y rectifica de sal. Si te agrada, apaga. Sirve con crotones y el perejil troceado.
Enjoy!

onion-pancakes-with-feta-cheese-argiro.name: Onion Pancakes With Feta Cheese

ingredients.item: 1/3 cup olive oil + a little extra for the pan
1/3 cup olive oil + a little extra for the pan

instructions: Finely chop the onions with their leaves in a bowl.
Disintegrate the tomato, squeeze it to remove its liquids and then chop its flesh. Add to the bowl with the onions.
Sprinkle with some salt and mix to start marinating.
Add the mint and dill.
Beat the eggs in a bowl. Add the olive oil and lukewarm water and mix.
We gradually incorporate the flour by mixing until we have a smooth, no knotted porridge.
Finally, add the onion mixture and grated cheeses stirring.
Heat a large non-stick pan over medium to strong heat and rub with some oil.
Pour spoonfuls of the porridge and shake the pan a little bit to spread and form the pancakes.
Bake the pancakes until golden and puffy for about 2 minutes.
Turn over with a spatula and bake for 2 more minutes until golden on the other side.
We take them off paper. We make the rest.
Serve the onion pancakes warm or at room temperature and accompany them with yogurt dip.

ooey-gooey-cinnamon-buns.name: Ooey-gooey Cinnamon Buns
instructions: To make the dough: Pour water into a liquid measure. Add 1 teaspoon of sugar and active dry yeast; stir until dissolved. Let stand until foamy, about 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, warm milk in a small saucepan over medium heat until it just starts to bubble around the edges; do not boil. Remove from the heat and stir in 1/4 cup sugar, 1/4 cup unsalted butter, and salt until melted. Let cool until lukewarm.
Lightly whisk eggs in a large bowl. Add yeast mixture, lukewarm milk mixture, and 1 ½ cups flour; stir until well combined.
Mix in remaining 2 ½ cups flour (1/2 cup at a time), mixing well after each addition, until dough comes together.
Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth, silky, and elastic, about 8 minutes.
Place dough in an oiled bowl and turn to coat with oil. Cover with a damp cloth and let rise in a warm place until doubled in volume, about 1 hour.
While the dough is rising, make the glaze: Melt 3/4 cup of unsalted butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Add 3/4 cup brown sugar and whisk until smooth.
Grease a 9x13-inch pan. Pour glaze mixture into the pan; sprinkle pecans over top.
Make the filling: Place 1/4 cup melted butter in a small bowl. Combine 3/4 cup of brown sugar, pecans, and cinnamon in a separate bowl.

When the dough has doubled in size, turn it out onto a lightly floured surface. Roll into a 14x18-inch rectangle. Brush 1/2 of the melted butter over the dough, leaving a 1/2-inch border unbuttered. Sprinkle brown sugar mixture over top.
Start at the long edge and roll the dough tightly, pinching the seams to seal. Brush remaining butter over the dough. Cut dough into 15 equal rolls.
Place rolls, cut-sides down, into the glaze in the prepared pan. Cover and let rise until double in size, about 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Uncover and bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 25 to 30 minutes.
Let cool in pan for 3 minutes, then invert onto a serving platter so the glaze is on top. Scrape any remaining glaze from the pan onto the rolls.

orange-and-poppy-seed-dessert-lezzet.name: Orange And Poppy Seed Dessert

ingredients.item: half water glass powder sugar Home

instructions: 1. Take the juice of sugar, water and oranges for cheerbet.
2. Leave boiling in the middle fire.
3. After boiling, add lemon juice and boil for 5-6 minutes and leave to cool by taking it from the stove.
4. Mix Margarin, eggs, vanilla, grated orange peel, mulmic and sugar in a bowl.
5. Add flour and baking powder and knead thoroughly.
6. Handle parts from dough.
7. After milk first, smear the poppy seeds and index to the lubricated tray.
8. Cook on each of them up to 180 degrees of bake.
9. Take the desserts from the oven to 5 minutes after waiting for the bucket on the horse.
10. Take a peek on the tray with a spoon and serve at least 2 hours.

orange-cake-with-almond-flour-keto-and-g.name: Orange Cake With Almond Flour (keto And Gluten-free Recipe)
orange-cake-with-almond-flour-keto-and-g.original_name: Bizcocho de naranja con harina de almendras (receta keto y sin gluten)

ingredients.item: 1 taza de harina de almendras (120 g)
1 cucharadita de polvo de hornear o levadura en polvo
1/3 taza de aceite de coco (80 g) o aceite de oliva suave (75 g)

instructions: To purify the oven at 180 ° C and to gain a cake mold.
Beat the eggs in a big bowl till they are sparkling.
Add almond flour, bake leaven or powder and coconut or soft olive oil and mix up until combined.
Add the erythritol and continue to bast till the mixture is soft and fluffy.
Add the orange fratch and fresh orange juice and mix up till they are incorporated.
Verter la mezcla en el molde para bizcocho y llevar al horno durante 25-30 minutos o hasta que un tenedor insertado en el centro del bizcocho salga limpio.
Dejar enfriar el bizcocho en el molde durante 10 minutos antes de desmoldarlo y dejarlo enfriar completamente en una rejilla.
orange-cake-with-almond-flour-keto-and-g.category: Easy Beer Recipes, Home Stretch Recipes

orange-carrot-smoothie.name: Orange Carrot Smoothie
instructions: Put orange juice, yogurt, carrot, banana, mango, orange and ice into a blender.
Blend until smooth and slushy. Add more juice if you prefer a thinner consistency.
Chill if desired and serve.
Enjoy!

orange-liqueur-argiro.name: Orange Liqueur
instructions: Wash the oranges well first and wipe them.
We scratch their skin and keep the zest.
With a sharp knife remove the peels around, while removing the white part with the membranes.
That is, we want the orange naked, to be seen around the inside (such as when we make orange fillets).
In a small pot, add the orange zest.
Cover it with water and from the time it boils count to 30.
We're going through it. Throw away the water and keep the hot zest, we'll use 1 tablespoon of it.
Add the water and sugar to a pot and mix over medium heat until it melts.
Once the sugar melts, add the oranges and simmer for 3 minutes from the time it boils.
With a dribbled sponge remove the oranges and simmer the syrup for 6 ́-7 ́ more (always in medium heat).
Let it cool.
Add the zest into the syrup and mix.
We equalize our oranges in sterile jars.
Add the brandy to the syrup, mix and pour the oranges into the jars.
Oranges must be fully covered up.
So if necessary, add some extra cognac to cover them.
Seal the jars airtight and leave them in a shady and cool place for 2 months to mature.
From the time we open the jars, keep the oranges in the refrigerator for 4 months.
After we consume them, we enjoy their unlikely liqueur, because in order to keep them covered with it.
Serve them in glasses with whipped cream.
However, we can also chop them into fruit salads by pouring them with their liquor or serving them together with dried plums made of wine.
Maturation time: 2 months

oven-baked-swai.name: Oven Baked Swai

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Place swai fish in a glass casserole dish and season with salt and black pepper.

Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat; cook and stir onion until softened, about 10 minutes. Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute. Pour tomatoes over onion mixture; cook and stir until heated through, about 5 minutes. Spoon tomato mixture over fish.
Bake in the preheated oven until fish flakes easily with a fork, about 20 minutes.

oven-pasta-with-spinach-and-bacon-lezzet.name: Oven Pasta With Spinach And Bacon
instructions: 1. Cook the oven pasta in the future way and drain the water.
2. 1 tablespoon of olive oil on it and mix.
3. Heat the sunflower oil in the pan.
4. Add and ask for chopped onion and saturation.
5. After 2-3 minutes, add and cook the spinach.
6. Add and mix the cream, salt and pepper.
7. Heat butter and sunflower oil for sos.
8.  Un ilave edip kavurun.
10. Add 5 cups of milk and cook in the form of a variety.
11. 11. Taste with salt and pepper.
12. Mix pasta with cradle sauce.
12. August Release 1/3 of pasta into lubricated oven container.
14 July Half water cups sprinkle the cheese of the eyebrow.
15. Add it on half of the spinach mortar.
16. Release on half of the remaining oven pasta.
17. September Half water cups sprinkle the cheese of the eyebrow.
18. Add the remaining pasta after spreading the remaining spinach pasta.
19. September Preheated 200 degree cook in oven for 20 minutes.
20. Add on the remaining cheese and cook until the publication and again roaming the oven.
21. Lightly fry in chopping pan in the form of cubes.
22. Spread on the pasta you remove from the oven.
23. Serve.

overnight-french-toast-casserole.name: Overnight French Toast Casserole
instructions: Pour melted butter into an 11x15-inch baking dish. Sprinkle brown sugar and cinnamon over the butter and top with bread slices, making sure slices are placed close together.
Mix milk, eggs, and vanilla extract in a bowl until thoroughly combined; pour over bread in the baking dish. Cover with aluminum foil and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Place the covered casserole in the preheated oven and bake for 30 minutes. Uncover, and bake until puffed and lightly golden, about 15 minutes more.

oyster-mushroom-pasta.name: Oyster Mushroom Pasta

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook linguine at a boil until tender yet firm to the bite, about 11 minutes. Drain and transfer to a serving bowl.

Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add mushrooms; cook and stir until tender and lightly browned, about 5 minutes. Stir in parsley, salt, and black pepper; cook until flavors combine, about 1 minute. Pour in heavy cream. Bring to a gentle boil; cook until sauce thickens slightly, about 5 minutes.
Pour sauce over pasta in the serving bowl; toss to combine. Add green onions and Parmesan cheese; toss until combined.

ozoni-new-years-good-luck-soup.name: Ozoni (new Year’s Good Luck Soup)

ingredients.item: Carrot sliced crosswise and cut into flower shape with a cookie cutter

ingredients.prep: chervil, or Italian parsley, leaves removed

instructions: Fill a medium pot with water and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Have a bowl of ice water ready. Add the spinach to the boiling water and blanch for 1 minute, or until wilted. Strain into a bowl. Transfer the wilted spinach to the ice water, then drain. Squeeze out excess water. Reserve the cooking water. Bunch the spinach up and cut crosswise into 2-inch pieces. Return the cooking water to the pot, add the carrots, and blanch for 1 minute. Strain into a bowl, reserving the cooking water. Transfer to the ice water, then drain.
Return the cooking water to the pot once more, add the chicken, and blanch for 1 minute (this removes odor from the chicken). Drain and discard the cooking water.

In a medium saucepan, combine the dashi and the chicken and bring to a boil over medium heat. Lower heat and add the sake, soy sauce, and salt. Taste and make adjustments. You can complete the recipe up to this step up to 3 days in advance. To serve the soup, bring the seasoned dashi and chicken to a boil over medium-high heat and then bring it down to a simmer while you toast the mochi. Remember, you want to serve the mochi freshly toasted so it tastes soft, not hard.

Preheat the broiler. To toast the mochi, line a baking sheet with aluminum foil. Place the mochi on the pan and broil until the pieces are toasted and puffy, turning them once to toast the other side. Be careful when handling the mochi. When you see one side pop, that is when to make the turn. This will take 3 to 5 minutes, depending on the freshness and thickness of the mochi. Put 1 piece of toasted mochi in each of 4 serving bowls.

Divide the shiitake mushrooms, kamaboko, carrots, and spinach among the bowls. Pour the hot soup three quarters of the way up the mochi and add the lemon peel and mitsuba. Serve immediately, with chopsticks.
